features.evidence: okay i promise i m not going to call it the windows macbook pro okay i promise probably so this is in fact the microsoft surfice laptop studio 2 and it is lovely it s clever it s a twoin one it looks great the performance is solid and i want to really it but it has a few problems it s also very expensive and the battery life isn t all it could be question is though should you get one of those or one of these things and if you do enjoy this review a cheeky little and subscribe would be lovely so the original the laptop studio 2 is a two in one convertible only cleverer this time the extra hinge behind the 14

1 type a following some feedback from the old model and on the other side a micro sd card reader audio jack and the pretty much obsolete surface connect port for the dc charger even microsoft has given up with this port for the newest surface dock which is thunderbolt 4 instead and if this really is for creatives then we should have a full size sd card reader not the bloody micro sd oh unlike the macbook pro competition you can t upgrade the ram or the ssd or anything really which is a shame because that often is one of the advantages of going for a windows laptop is that you can sol open it up and upgrade it over time not with this now being a surface laptop you get a great keyboard and a big haptic trackpad both are very comfortable to use the keys are well spaced and nice and and accurate type on the touchpad also now has an adaptive mode which disables multi touch gestures and looks for more multiple points of contact and movement instead which should make it easier for people with different physical input needs it s an accessibility option as for the display well it s fine it s 1600p it s sharp viewing angles are great and everything is lovely and smooth thanks to that dynamic 120 htz plus the touchcreen is accurate and responsive however i measured the hdr peak brightness at 425 nits on a 10 window which tallies with the hdr 400 spec but it is very average although i still enjoyed watching tvs and movies on this especially with dolby vision and so indoors it s bright enough although you ll definitely struggle to use it outdoors and reflections from this glossy screen are ridiculous as for color accuracy in my tests this hits 100 of the srgb gamut but only 87 and 80 of the p3 and the rgb gamuts and it s just nothing special for a device where the screen is so key as for performance this is a pretty powerful convertible especially in the higher end spec which i ve been testing so i ve got the 13th gen i7 i ve got 64 gigs of ram and that 80w 460 which is great for graphics and design work and 4k video and photo editing however to keep noise and heat down the cpu throttles at only 70 c meaning performance will fall behind other machines with the same cpu but that have a higher temperature limit as for benchmarks well i put this against the most recent m2 and m3 based macbooks and macbook pros and it really hits home the advantages apple have made in the last couple of years in most cases is this was slower than an m2 pro and way behind the m2 max let alone the new m3s but before you shouted me in the comments i know it s not apple s 2 apples pun slightly intended as this is a windows machine but bearing in mind the similar prices and the target audience i think it s a fair comparison plus there are plenty of much more powerful windows workstations for similar money gaming performance is pretty great though frame rates were consistent with few frame drops and everything was lovely and smooth especially with that 120 hz screen what you d expect from a 4060 i got nearly 100 frames per with ultra settings in total war pharaoh at native 1600p which looks a lot sharper than 1080 fora motorsport looked great with medium settings and dls performance and i averaged a healthy 80 fps although of course you could always drop it adp and firing up bulders gate 3 in ultra i averaged 69 fps without dlss but then i maxed out the 120 hz refresh rate with dlss performance and while i m on games the dolby atmos tune speakers on this thing are very impressive especially as you can t see they re clear there s a good amount of base and it means you don t feel you need to reach for your headphones every time you watch something or play a game but then we have microsoft co pilot and the idea here is to roll several ai tools and abilities into one natural speech tool within windows 11 making the os itself a bit more of a feature although you can also get this through edge or your browser and it understands context so if you ask it to change your windows settings turning on dark mode changing your wallpaper asking for help or just asking not to be disturbed for a while or if you use a snipping tool for a screen grab it can highlight the text letting you then copy and paste or even redact it before you save and share and it gives you answers to questions or summaries based on web searches and it uses the gpt for ai to answer in everyday speech and it can save a heck of a lot of time especially when you ask it to write a review it s not bad although still worth double checking you can ask it to draft an email for a meal plan or to plan out your road trip and the best places to check out along the way it s all very clever you just have to remember to use it i forget it s there sometimes and it is also still in preview and as it rolls out there will be new features added in although of course this isn t exclusive to surface laptops it s any windows 11 device although it is a staggered roll out so different devices will get it at different times however as usual with higher performance windows laptops the battery life isn t great my unit with its 4060 only managed 5 to 6 hours in my usual full screen video test and around the same in my light use test for photo and video work it s going to be a lot less to be fair not everyone needs all day battery life from the laptop especially if you re using it at the desk at the office you ve got the power plugged in but 14 in laptops are generally a bit more portable than bigger desktop replacements and considering the price and of course the competition it s a little bit disappointing especially as a macbook pro 14 will likely last you twice as long and then we ve got the webcam at the top here it s a 1080p 30fps webcam i thought this might be a little bit better it s blowing out the background there but yeah the quality is fine you do have a couple of features being able to boket out your cameraman plus there s autof framing say hello to producer pete here by the way who helped out with this one and all this is down to the new mpu ai processing chip which means all this can be processed on the fly which is a first for an intel based surfice device so despite some issues i still genuinely do really this studio laptop 2o i think you re going to have to really want that studio convertible tablet experience and you re going to have to want that higher performance as well but if those things are important to you you have some pretty deep pockets and you do definitely want a windows 11 laptop then yeah you could do a lot worse and i can definitely see a version three of this perhaps with an oled screen 14th gen intel cpu and a longer battery life that would be a much easier recommendation but given we don t see these surface laptops refresh that off and it could be a couple of years away otherwise there are plenty of other portable two in one windows laptops that are fast enough for graphic design work with better screens and longer battery life and the performance and battery advantages of the m3 macbook pros is really hard to ignore given their similarish pricing and i m not sure i can get behind the base model you re not going to want to carry around that extra size and weight without the gpu it s designed for and things video editing and gaming is great with a 40 series gpu but what do you reckon do you think you could be tempted to spend that money on a service studio laptop this or would you rather go for a fruit based rival let me know what you make of the new service laptop in the comments below if you ve got any questions drop a comment as well do my best to answer them and if you did enjoy this review which i hope you did because you watch the whole thing then a and subscribe would be fantastic thank you so much for watching guys i ll see you next time right here on the tech chat well not exactly right here cuz i m in a hotel room right now but back at the studio next week

0 and plenty of connectivity including wi fi 6e and a couple of thunderbolt four ports but then there s the price the base model with that 512 storage 16 gigs of ram and the onboard x graphics with the intel i7 is 2 grand which is a lot of money it s macbook pro 14 with m3 money which performs differently mostly better and also has much better battery life two grand for a laptop that doesn t have a dedicated gpu is a lot of money an extra 400 gets you the rtx 450 an extra,200 gets you a 4060 top spec we re looking at around 3 and a half grand which is high end macbook pro money although to be fair they do go a lot more expensive but also the offer more customization and perhaps a noed screen option would have really helped put some distance between this and the macbook pros especially as this is aimed at artists and designers who would definitely appreciate oled s better color accuracy and hdr personally i think the 40 50 models offer better value but if you spending the best part of three grand then perhaps another 500 quid or so for the spec you do want is the way to go especially if you re buying on the business and you get your tax back and all that and then you ve got the slim pen 2 which is an extra 120 quid it is very nice to use but there are plenty of third party mpp 2

4 in touchscreen lets you tilt to three magnetically held positions so you can use it a regular laptop or in tablet mode or studio mode where it sits angled in front of the keyboard and becomes a digital easel and it s a really nice way of interacting with a screen whether you re working you re drawing doodling watching movies and it reminds me of the much bigger and also much pricier studio 2 plus or even an ipad pro with a magic keyboard and if you go for the optional surface slim pen 2 as well which is charged and held by some very strong magnets here under the front edge the whole thing just encourages you to be creative and microsoft reckon this is perfect for you creative professionals digital artists and i assume because they someone to me talentless scribblers as well but it s also pretty good for gaming and i can do that so while the laptop studio 2 is mostly a hardware refresh a spec bump it s a pretty worthwhile one and whichever model you go before you ll get a 13th gen intel i7 13700 h which is a pretty solid chip as well as the integrated xc ios graphics which are fine but what is exciting is you can spec it up to a rtx 4060 graphics card that s an 80 w tgp card with up to 64 gigs of ram and a terabyte of storage you also have the option of a slightly cheaper rtx 4050 or you can go with an rtx 2000 a workstation gpu although you d really only want that for big cat assemblies or large scale data simulation stuff the base model now gets 52 gigs of storage and the intel iris xe onboard graphics and all models get a brighter 120 hz pixel sense touchcreen with hdr 400 and dobby vision there s also a new 1080p studio webcam with a new mpu which gives you some fancy live ai effects we have windows hello 2
